responsibilities: Design and build batch and streaming data pipelines using Apache Spark and Apache Kafka
Develop dbt models to transform raw event data into clean, well-documented datasets
Maintain and extend data platform on Google Cloud including BigQuery, Dataflow, and Cloud Composer
Implement data quality checks, schema validation, and alerting using Great Expectations
Collaborate with data scientists and analytics engineers to support feature development
Contribute to orchestration, CI/CD for dbt, and data catalogue platform work

mustHaveSkills.name: Python
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Proficiency in Python for data engineering

mustHaveSkills.name: Apache Spark
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Apache Spark (PySpark preferred) – production pipeline experience required

mustHaveSkills.name: SQL
mustHaveSkills.rawText: SQL at advanced level: window functions, CTEs, query optimisation

mustHaveSkills.name: BigQuery
mustHaveSkills.rawText: BigQuery or Snowflake – hands-on experience with a cloud warehouse

mustHaveSkills.name: dbt
mustHaveSkills.rawText: dbt (core or cloud) – writing, testing, and documenting models

workAuthorizationSignals: Must have the right to work in Australia
summary: Mid-to-senior data engineering role at Afterpay building petabyte-scale pipelines. Strong Python, Spark, SQL, and dbt required. Remote-first within Australia; Australian working rights required.
